hooks.command: python3 -c 'import requests, yfinance; v = tuple(int("".join(ch for ch in p if ch.isdigit()) or 0) for p in yfinance.__version__.split(".")[:3]); assert v >= (0, 2, 40)' 2>/dev/null || { pip3 install -q -r "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null || pip3 install -q --user --break-system-packages -r "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null; python3 -c 'import requests, yfinance; v = tuple(int("".join(ch for ch in p if ch.isdigit()) or 0) for p in yfinance.__version__.split(".")[:3]); assert v >= (0, 2, 40)' 2>/dev/null || echo "[atlas-research] Python deps missing or stale: need requests + yfinance>=0.2.40 (older yfinance gets HTTP 429 from Yahoo, so every multiple comes back empty). Fix manually: pip3 install --upgrade --break-system-packages -r '$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/requirements.txt'"; }
